Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Proceedings
Off Calendar Feb-05-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Rogelio Serrano-Gutierrez; Lagasse Branch Bell + Kinkead LLP; 628-222-5870; appearing as counsel for defendant Kevin Cruz.

Not contested. The court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT PETER LUK NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND STAY PROCEEDINGS is GRANTED. All claims by the Plaintiff against Defendant Luk shall proceed in arbitration. The action is not stayed and shall otherwise proceed in this court.

Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-05-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Rogelio Serrano-Gutierrez; Lagasse Branch Bell + Kinkead LLP; 628-222-5870; appearing as counsel for defendant Kevin Cruz.

Not contested. The court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT KEVIN CRUZ DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained with leave to amend to address all issues raised by the demurrer. No opposition filed.

Proposed Order submitted for review. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)
